<!-- =================================================================
     LOGOS.HTML
     Berisi 2 logo (Universitas Diponegoro & DSDM) di-encode base64
     langsung di dalam HTML, sehingga TIDAK butuh hosting eksternal
     maupun izin akses Drive tambahan. Disisipkan pada Login.
================================================================= -->
<div class="login-logos">
  <img class="login-logo login-logo--undip" alt="Logo Universitas Diponegoro" src="data:image/png;base64," />
  <img class="login-logo login-logo--dsdm" alt="Logo DSDM" src="data:image/png;base64," />
</div>
